scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix packages/framework && npm run build --prefix packages/framework && npm install --prefix module/ai-free && npm install --prefix module/web-search && npm install --prefix module/task-worker
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build --prefix packages/framework && npm install --prefix module/ai-free --silent && npm run build --prefix module/ai-free && npm install --prefix module/web-search --silent && npm run build --prefix module/web-search && npm install --prefix module/task-worker --silent && npm run build --prefix module/task-worker
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && node --test dist/test/**/*.test.js && npm run test --prefix module/ai-free && npm run test --prefix module/web-search && npm run test --prefix module/task-worker
